summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TratorShop bug fixes and improvements. All major features working correctly including trimestral plans, listing idempotency, profile photo upload, public seller pages, dealer limits, condition filters, admin photo visibility, and pending user notifications.

design_issues.issue: Trimestral text not visible in frontend UI (but working correctly in backend API with 90-day validity)
No listing images visible in admin view (may be due to test data having no images)

passed_tests: GET /api/vendedor/{user_id} - Public seller profile endpoint working (404 for non-existent)
POST /api/user/profile/photo - Profile photo upload working (422 for missing file)
GET /api/admin/stats - Admin stats includes pending users count for badge
GET /api/admin/listings - Admin listings include images field
PUT /api/admin/users/{id}/limit - Dealer limit successfully set to 20
POST /api/listings - Listing creation requires authentication (idempotency protection)
Frontend - Homepage loads with all navigation elements
Frontend - Condition filters (Todos, Novo, Semi-novo, Usado) all working
Frontend - Admin login and dashboard working correctly
Frontend - Admin panel shows pending users badge (0 pending users)
Frontend - Public seller profile route exists and handles 404
Frontend - Authentication required for listing creation and profile editing
Frontend - Admin dashboard displays proper stats and quick actions
Integration - All API calls working correctly with proper authentication
